ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the employee */,
  "office" TEXT /* Office location of the employee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started working */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the employee */,
  "similarity" TEXT /* Similarity score for employee matching */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the employee */,
  "job_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Job satisfaction score */,
  "performance_score" INTEGER /* Performance score */,
  "hierarchy_level" TEXT /* Hierarchy level in the organization */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_office FOREIGN KEY ("office") REFERENCES offices ("office_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the office */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the office */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the office */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the office */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the office */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of employees the office can accommodate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "salary_grade" TEXT /* Salary grade associated with the position */,
  "required_education" TEXT /* Minimum educational qualification required */,
  "required_experience" TEXT /* Minimum years of experience required */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Key responsibilities of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the department was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_departments" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started in the department */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the department (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_positions" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started in the position */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the position (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the employee */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who conducted the review */,
  "reviewer_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "self_assessment" INTEGER /* Self-assessment score from the employee */,
  "improvement_plan" TEXT /* Plan for improvement, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the access event */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access event */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
column_names: Position or role of the employee
Phone number of the emergency contact
Date of birth of the employee
Contact phone number for the office
Maximum number of employees the office can accommodate
Salary grade associated with the position

Date the employee left the department (if applicable)

Date the employee left the position (if applicable)
